title: premna arborea
intro: Premna arborea, also known as the Blue Vervain or Kala Jhara, is a tropical plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Premna arborea include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and aid in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Premna arborea is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
